scripts.test: pnpm run test:web && pnpm run test:backend
scripts.dev:api: pnpm run build:backend && sam local start-api -t packages/backend/template.yaml --port 3000
scripts.dev:local:api: pnpm run build:backend && sam local start-api -t packages/backend/template.yaml --port 3000 --env-vars packages/backend/env.local.json
scripts.dev:local: pnpm dlx concurrently -k -n api,web -c yellow,cyan "pnpm run dev:local:api" "pnpm run dev:local:web"
